posts.caption: Benny's first 4th. Welcome to the fam 🇺🇸

Mark Zuckerberg says Meta has been working on glasses for over a decade.

In the latest episode of @ideageneration, Zuckerberg reflects on the future of personal superintelligence, why AI should empower individuals instead of replacing them, the vision behind Meta’s new AI Glasses, and the philosophy that’s guided him through more than two decades of innovation.

Watch the full episode at the LINK IN BIO.
Years in the making. Meta Glasses are here.
Our new line of @metaglasses is available today. Three shapes, 26 style combos, with our most advanced Meta AI built in. Plus, three custom styles designed by @kyliejenner

A new era of science is here — and it starts with the integration of frontier AI and frontier biology. Hear more from @zuck, @priscillachan, and Alex Rives on @nopriorspod. Full episode at link in bio.
Taking a page out of the @jockowillink playbook. Murph challenge 2026. Proud to be a part of it.
Happy 50th @davecamarillo! Thanks for getting me into fighting. It changed my life. Here's to 50 more years of punching people in the face.
Always a great time seeing these legends. Congrats @charlesdobronxs, @caioborralho, and @drewdober. @blessedmma is always impressive. Best sport in the world.
Thanks to Prada for having us in Milan!
Two decades, many awesome projects, and even more plaid shirts. Grateful for 20 years of building the future together!
